CH-COUNTER-1.exact_quote: Vendor may use the resulting information for independent analytics, benchmarking, product development, and model improvement. The information is pseudonymized but remains linkable to individuals. Service-analytics working files are retained for 30 days, and anonymization controls are reviewed every 3 months.
CH-COUNTER-1.proposed_redline: Vendor will not use personal data for its own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, or other independent business purposes.

CH-REGRESSION.exact_quote: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
CH-REGRESSION.proposed_redline: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Personal Data" means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations.
CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.proposed_redline: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data created from or relating to Customer personal data, except only where data has been irreversibly anonymized under applicable law.

CH-NEW-DEVIATION.exact_quote: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
CH-NEW-DEVIATION.proposed_redline: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a personal-data breach.
